욥기 15:2.content: “Should a wise man answer with vain knowledge, and fill himself with the east wind?

욥기 15:3.content: Should he reason with unprofitable talk, or with speeches with which he can do no good?

욥기 15:4.content: Yes, you do away with fear, and hinder devotion before God.

욥기 15:5.content: For your iniquity teaches your mouth, and you choose the language of the crafty.

욥기 15:6.content: Your own mouth condemns you, and not I. Yes, your own lips testify against you.

욥기 15:7.content: “Are you the first man who was born? Or were you brought out before the hills?

욥기 15:8.content: Have you heard the secret counsel of God? Do you limit wisdom to yourself?

욥기 15:9.content: What do you know that we don’t know? What do you understand which is not in us?

욥기 15:10.content: With us are both the gray-headed and the very aged men, much elder than your father.

욥기 15:11.content: Are the consolations of God too small for you, even the word that is gentle toward you?

욥기 15:12.content: Why does your heart carry you away? Why do your eyes flash,

욥기 15:13.content: That you turn your spirit against God, and let such words go out of your mouth?

욥기 15:14.content: What is man, that he should be clean? What is he who is born of a woman, that he should be righteous?

욥기 15:15.content: Behold, he puts no trust in his holy ones. Yes, the heavens are not clean in his sight;

욥기 15:16.content: how much less one who is abominable and corrupt, a man who drinks iniquity like water!

욥기 15:17.content: “I will show you, listen to me; that which I have seen I will declare

욥기 15:18.content: (which wise men have told by their fathers, and have not hidden it;

욥기 15:19.content: to whom alone the land was given, and no stranger passed among them):

욥기 15:20.content: the wicked man writhes in pain all his days, even the number of years that are laid up for the oppressor.

욥기 15:21.content: A sound of terrors is in his ears. In prosperity the destroyer will come on him.

욥기 15:22.content: He doesn’t believe that he will return out of darkness. He is waited for by the sword.

욥기 15:23.content: He wanders abroad for bread, saying, ‘Where is it?’ He knows that the day of darkness is ready at his hand.

욥기 15:24.content: Distress and anguish make him afraid. They prevail against him, as a king ready to the battle.

욥기 15:25.content: Because he has stretched out his hand against God, and behaves himself proudly against the Almighty,

욥기 15:26.content: he runs at him with a stiff neck, with the thick shields of his bucklers,

욥기 15:27.content: because he has covered his face with his fatness, and gathered fat on his thighs.

욥기 15:28.content: He has lived in desolate cities, in houses which no one inhabited, which were ready to become heaps.

욥기 15:29.content: He will not be rich, neither will his substance continue, neither will their possessions be extended on the earth.

욥기 15:30.content: He will not depart out of darkness. The flame will dry up his branches. He will go away by the breath of God’s mouth.

욥기 15:31.content: Let him not trust in emptiness, deceiving himself; for emptiness will be his reward.

욥기 15:32.content: It will be accomplished before his time. His branch will not be green.

욥기 15:33.content: He will shake off his unripe grape as the vine, and will cast off his flower as the olive tree.

욥기 15:34.content: For the company of the godless will be barren, and fire will consume the tents of bribery.

욥기 15:35.content: They conceive mischief, and produce iniquity. Their heart prepares deceit.”
